3.4 Tests with PRP
Platelet incubation on the surface of the samples revealed
statistically signiﬁcant differences in the number of adher-
ing platelets and their aggregates for NiTi alloy in initial
state (Fig. 5a) compared with an a-C(Ag) + TiO2 layer (Fig.
5b). Lower adhesion and aggregation was noted for the
material after the hybrid process (Fig. 5c, d). It is important
to note that the platelets in the population on the carbon
coating surface included both non-activated and middle-
